programme.title: E5 - Staircase Shooter Or Defensive Dad?
programme.desc: An angry confrontation leads to a 31-year-old father facing life behind bars after shooting his ex-girlfriend's boyfriend in the leg. He insists he was defending his ex and their child from an intruder.

programme.title: E4 - Joshua Aide
programme.desc: Joshua Aide, a former Marine, is on trial for the murder of his ex-girlfriend's father, as well as her attempted murder and that of a family friend. He claims he was ambushed by the three.

programme.title: E4 - High Stakes
programme.desc: Undercover ATF and DEA agents are reminded to never judge a book by its cover and to always be on their toes. Even small-time suspects have the potential to unleash terror.

programme.title: E12 - Nightmare In New England
programme.desc: Maine is brought to its knees when its most popular teen turns up dead. With the help of a dedicated mother and a community that never forgets, the secret killer is finally exposed.

programme.title: E2 - Patrick De La Cerde
programme.desc: After a man is shot dead at his doorstep on the night he planned to propose, detectives follow a trail of obsession and jealousy that leads to a dangerous ex-lover.

programme.title: E6 - Killer Knifeman Or Innocent Defender?
programme.desc: A 52-year-old VP of a medical center faces 95 years in prison for fatally stabbing a doctor's husband. He insists he was trapped by a man intent on harming him and forced to defend himself.

programme.desc: Maggie makes a connection with a 911 operator to help find a girl.

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E1 - Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo & his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, & a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him & Daniel around the house! From boomerang target practice to a building block showdown, the chaos never stops!

programme.title: E5 - Baby John's Guide to Being Safe!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns all about being safe! First, he learns how important it is to always put on his seatbelt when he goes for a ride. Then, Mom & Dad teach the kids what to do if an accident happens & how to avoid them. The safety lessons continue as Baby John learns how to be safe while playing at the playground, at the beach & even while swimming in the pool. It's always important to be safe!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E1 - Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo & his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, & a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him & Daniel around the house! programme.title: How The Martial Art Khomlainai Brings Bodo And Santhal Communities Together
programme.desc: In Assam, decades of conflict kept Bodo and Santhal communities apart. Now the traditional martial art Khomlainai is bringing children together, who have never spoken or played with each other before. Mejing Narzary, a former Bodo underground fighter, and Khermu Karmakar, a former general of the Santhal insurgent force, have achieved this miracle.

programme.title: What Motivates Us To Protect Our Environment?
programme.desc: In the Western Ghats, locals are learning that tending forests is profitable. Also: green jobs, environmental storytelling, and a river clean-up in Germany.

programme.title: Best Of DW Podcasts
programme.desc: Select DW podcasts enrich the program with current analyses of world politics and its influence on our daily lives. There will also be space in the program for lively discussions about social standards and taboos.

programme.title: Norway At Its Limit - Tourists Flood The North
programme.desc: 2024 was a record year for Norwegian tourism, with almost 38.6 million overnight stays. The country's cuisine, culture, and unique destinations entice visitors. But tourism brings its own problems.

programme.title: Yoko's Computer Game
programme.desc: Yoko gets the kids to appreciate nature by tricking them into thinking the park is actually a computer game!

programme.title: The Firefighter (Sabrina Cohen-Hatton) and The Bionic Man (Mark Ormrod)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Sabrina Cohen-Hatton, the most senior ranking firefighter in the UK, and Mark Ormrod, triple amputee and four-time Invictus Games gold medallist, share their incredible stories of resilience.

programme.title: Under Pressure
programme.desc: Marisa is used to supporting others, but today it's her dog Millie going under the knife. Walter, the Whippet, is a changed dog at home, but how will he cope in the park?

programme.title: Kitchen Chemistry
programme.desc: There's a whole laboratory waiting to be explored in your kitchen. In this episode host Steve Spangler reveals how we can make crazy creations such as soap souffle and elephant toothpaste out of ordinary stuff from the supermarket.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: In this episode, Dr Chris and Dr Xand look at bones, and show you an experiment to make them bendy.

programme.title: Eight Heads Tall
programme.desc: In this episode we learn about non-standard measurement units that are often based on the concept of anthropometry: the built-in ratios for body measurements first proposed by Leonardo DaVinci. Can we measure people by merely knowing the size of their heads?

programme.title: The Buzz on Bugs
programme.desc: Eric learns that insects have a head, thorax, abdomen, antennae, and six legs. He is surprised to find out that spiders are not insects – they are arachnids.

programme.title: International Rivalry
programme.desc: Will captain Emily be fit enough to skate with her team, and what is the surprise in store for Afton? Meanwhile, back in Nottingham, young figure skater Solomon needs to nail his axels if he wants to impress Coach Tamara.

programme.title: West Coast - Heading For Bird Island
programme.desc: Trying to find a shortcut to Bird Island, the youngsters end up stuck in a desolate dune field. Night falls and they encounter creatures that both scare and enthral them. They find a path to the coast and must cross a mighty river with the help of local fishermen.

programme.title: The Firefighter (Sabrina Cohen-Hatton) and The Bionic Man (Mark Ormrod)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Sabrina Cohen-Hatton, the most senior ranking firefighter in the UK, and Mark Ormrod, triple amputee and four-time Invictus Games gold medallist, share their incredible stories of resilience.

programme.title: The Spice Craze
programme.desc: Spices are a hot item in the Middle Ages! Lord Roach just can't get enough of the stuff! If you can't find the spice you want at the local market stall, it's probably on the other side of the world! And so off goes Little Lewis.

programme.title: The Perplexing Parrot
programme.desc: When a lost parrot appears in Ayrton Park, Addison must find some way of returning it to its rightful owner by deciphering clues from the cryptic phrases that the errant bird utters.

programme.title: Clothespin
programme.desc: What can Hepi and Briko make with clothespins? Let's find out!

programme.title: S'no Trouble
programme.desc: When Fico can't yodel down an avalanche of snow from the clubhouse roof, Doki wonders what does cause avalanches? Luckily, it's time for their ski trip to Innsbruck, Austria. The team must find a way to start a real, controlled avalanche, to make things safe again!

programme.title: S'no Trouble

programme.title: Pittsburgh
programme.desc: Pittsburgh exploration: Andy Warhol Museum, thrilling cave rappel outside the city, city hotspots with local teens, and metal bracelet crafting with a local artist. A diverse week of art, adventure, and creativity with Nicole in western Pennsylvania!

programme.title: Magnificent Mucus
programme.desc: The doctors reveal the power of mighty mucus in keeping bacteria and air particles out of your airways. In the emergency department, Maisie has a bead stuck up her nose!

programme.title: Surf's Up
programme.desc: Surf's up in Kiwifruit Valley, and Newts is determined to learn to surf like Heni. But one day the waves are huge and the next day they're gone and the kids have to figure out why.

programme.title: Crazy Craters
programme.desc: Eric learns that most asteroids burn out before they reach our planet. But sometimes, when they're super huge, they hit Earth and make really big craters. He does an experiment to show what would happen in that situation.

programme.title: Pittsburgh
programme.desc: Pittsburgh adventure: Battled rapids on a white water adventure, savored Primanti Brothers' iconic taste, hands-on bird experience at National Aviary, and glided across the sky with the Pittsburgh soaring club. A week of diverse thrills in Pennsylvania!

programme.title: Maka 2
programme.desc: It is a youth-oriented drama series that follows the lives of six high school students enrolled in the Arts & Performance section of public school, Douglas Mac Arthur High School for the Arts aka. MAKA.

programme.title: Stars On The Floor 2026
programme.desc: The program is set to bring together the biggest names from TV and the digital world, all paired up for the country's biggest dance-collab competition.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Un Dimanche A La Campagne:2025-2026
programme.desc: A weekend together, far from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. A moment out of time to get to know one another, talk of love, friendship, life. E12 - Vietnam Pow Escape
programme.desc: A German-American pilot, Dieter Dengler, uses survival skills honed as a child to escape a secret prison in Laos in the early years of the Vietnam war.

programme.title: E7 - Astonishing Feats
programme.desc: History is full of people pushing the limits. Like the man who single-handedly liberated a town during World War II. Or an epic robbery in Buenos Aires that was pulled off with zero casualties.

programme.title: E318 - Picking Nirvana
programme.desc: In Ohio, a late friend's picking nirvana has the Wolfe brothers howling. With a successful demolition business and an eye for treasure, Brian amassed a mind-boggling collection of rare, oversize gems.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: E212 - Mr Scarecrow
programme.desc: The birds keep eating the seeds from Grandpa Pig's flower garden. Peppa and George make a scarecrow, which stops the birds from eating. But Peppa is worried that the birds are hungry, so Granny Pig gives the birdies a birdfeeder with their own seeds.

programme.title: E701 - Castle
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig take Peppa and George on a visit to a castle!

programme.title: E733 - George's New Clothes
programme.desc: George, Peppa and Mummy Pig head off to Miss Rabbit's clothes shop to get George some brand new clothes.

programme.title: E731 - The Market
programme.desc: Peppa and family find some great things to buy from the market and even get a special gift from Mr. Fox's stall.

programme.title: E107 - The Crew Builds A Beaver Home / The Crew Fixes A Road
programme.desc: The power is out in Builder Cove! When the pups find out a beaver is to blame, they've got to build him a new home to bring the power back. // When Speed Meister damages the road ahead of the town helper parade, the pups work fast to repave the way.

programme.title: E106 - It's Only A Mystery... / The Battle
programme.desc: Taking after his favourite detective, Barbabravo looks for a case to solve. Can he solve the mystery of the missing ice statue? // Inspired by their favourite heroes, the Barbababies make costumes. But no heroes are possible without villains...

programme.title: E203 - Tidy
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: E312 - The Crew Builds A Giant Tunnel
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: E212 - The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: E413 - Side-Swiped
programme.desc: Dora and Boots run into Swiper and his nephew Zorrito! They must make it home before Swiper and Zorrito can swipe their teddy bear.

programme.title: E219 - Foggy Day
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig are taking Peppa and George to play in the playground. On the way it gets a bit foggy, and soon it is so foggy they can't see. They decide to go home. But which way is home?

programme.title: E220 - George's Birthday
programme.desc: Today is George's birthday and Mummy and Daddy Pig have a special day planned. George gets a new Brontosaurus toy and the family go to the museum to see lots of different dinosaurs.

programme.title: E217 - Jumble Sale
programme.desc: Peppa's playgroup is holding a jumble sale to raise money for a new roof and Madame Gazelle asks everyone to bring something to sell. Peppa and her friends bring in an old toy but they soon realise that favourite toys can be hard to let go of.

programme.title: E713 - The Police
programme.desc: Police Officer Panda and Police Officer Squirrel have come to teach Peppa and her friends all about bicycle safety.

programme.title: E208 - Pups And The Big Freeze / Pups Save A Basketball Game
programme.desc: A winter ice storm causes trouble all over Adventure Bay. The PAW Patrol races to the rescue! // Mayor Goodway challenges Mayor Humdinger's Basketball team to a game. The pups pitch in and become the Adventure Bay All-Stars!

programme.title: E211 - Plankton Retires / Trident Trouble
programme.desc: Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he's still up to no good. // When SpongeBob accidentally picks up Neptune's magic trident, there's no telling what trouble he may cause!

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E601 - Present Danger / Stressed for the Part
programme.desc: Dressed as David Steele, Lincoln is on the hunt for his stolen birthday present before it's destroyed. // After landing a role in a Dairyland production, Luan must hide this news from Mrs. Bernardo, who she beat out.

programme.title: E601 - Present Danger / Stressed for the Part
programme.desc: Dressed as David Steele, Lincoln is on the hunt for his stolen birthday present before it's destroyed. // After landing a role in a Dairyland production, Luan must hide this news from Mrs. Bernardo, who she beat out.

programme.title: E211 - The Library
programme.desc: Lily must retrieve a book from the dreaded library: a horrifying maze of unknown terrors. Can she and Jack escape alive?

programme.title: E104 - The Boba-Get / Be Your Own Bean
programme.desc: Lil's favorite boba shop is closing! The kids try to save the café using pucker limes, but are quickly forced to save Canyon Valley from the pucker. // Lil and Min both realize how similar they are to their moms and set out to distinguish themselves.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E245 - Gary's Got Legs / King Plankton
programme.desc: Gary is given a set of limbs to keep up with SpongeBob, but soon makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. // Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself down and declaring himself king of SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: E102 - The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls with disastrous results.

programme.title: E106 - #GoomerSitting
programme.desc: When Sam and Cat agree to babysit Goomer while Dice goes away, they misapply Goomer's medication which causes him to temporarily lose his eyesight before a big match.

programme.title: E108 - Mikey Takes Charge
programme.desc: Mikey and Genghis Frog are sent into the storm on a supply run to the local market when they encounter the electrifying LEE THE EEL! Now Mikey has to step up and be a LEADER!

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E119 - Radioactive Cat
programme.desc: Bose's Mom, Celia, picks up Schwoz's lost radioactive cat from outside SW.A.G. and takes it home, so Danger Force and Captain Man have to try and get it back before she goes nuclear.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E212 - Pick Patrick's Path
programme.desc: The Lawnies vote for what Patrick does next.

programme.title: E244 - The Krusty Slammer
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into a jailhouse after Plankton breaks the law, but crime only pays for so long.

programme.title: E503 - Family Bonding
programme.desc: Now the oldest in the house, Leni struggles to follow in Lori's footsteps as the family's babysitter

programme.title: E212 - Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Lily and Jack are half-siblings thrown together for a summer who must learn how to navigate their new family dynamic while also helping with the Wylde Pak family's chaotic pet grooming business.

programme.title: Lutong Bahay
programme.desc: A magazine show that features a delightful mix of heartfelt stories and mouthwatering dishes, where every recipe has a tale to tell -- heartwarming tales of triumph, challenges, and cherished memories.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

The Gambling Ghost
programme.desc: Fatty Bao was a hotel worker, yearning for sudden wealth. Therefore, he and his co-worker entered the gambling world to the dismay of his father. When Fatty hit rock bottom, the ghost of his grandfather resurrected to help him. Later, Fatty learnt that his grandfather was murdered. Therefore, he would stop at nothing to avenge his death...

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Jackie Chan stars as the girl-chasing private detective Ryo Saeba in this hilarious live-action adaptation of the popular Japanese manga series, City Hunter. Hired to track down the runaway daughter of a publishing tycoon, Ryo ends up on a luxury cruise ship hijacked by terrorists. With the help from his jealous assistant Carrie, undercover agent Saeko and gambler Gundam, Ryo must foil the nefarious plot.

programme.title: Heart to Hearts
programme.desc: Advertising professional Alex, just breaks up with his model girlfriend Peggy. In order to release Alex's anxiety, his friend invites him to be the part time director of a choir. Alex meets Vivian in the choir. However, Vivian's mother Chu Lai Ngo, a divorced woman who dislikes Alex at the first sight. When Alex and Chu are getting closer and closer, they imperceptibly fall in love with each other. At this moment, Peggy suddenly comes back to Alex asking for being together once again. Alex has to make his choice of love between these two women...

programme.title: City Hunter

programme.title: Tokyo Raiders
programme.desc: On the marriage day of Macy, her bridegroom Takahashi disappears. She comes to Tokyo to look for him. She meets Tommy, a debt collector and Lenny, a private eye of a gangster boss...

programme.title: Hong Kong Graffiti
programme.desc: There was a kid who used to serve with his father in a night club‘s washroom. By chance, he became a singer and turned into the hottest star in the club. His teacher however, fell from his golden days. As the teacher realized that “Nothing Lasts Forever”, he was content with his quiet and simple life. The story took place in a night club in the sixties. Zhang Jiawing was a cheerful kid. His best friend Gao Zhi was a shoe boy. Gao‘s father disappeared after losing all his money in stock speculation. The two kids became students to the once renowned singer Johnny, whose career was at low ebb. Johnny had great hopes on them. He vowed to make them become the best of the best...

programme.desc: The clock is ticking: Only 100 hours. Can they successfully unite as one voice before time runs out? An intense music travelogue featuring international icons and K-Pop stars.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: The Best Of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.desc: Award winning chef Jason Atherton continues his journey through Dubai at the beach, where he cooks up some delicious fish and seafood recipes inspired by this beautiful coastal city. programme.title: E1 - A Penguin Proposal
programme.desc: Watch an Antarctic gentoo penguin pop the question with a rocky token of his devotion, then learn how a Madagascar lemur uses toxic millipedes for pest control. Bone up on makeup techniques with a flamingo and meet a honey badger that can pick locks.

programme.title: E4 - Pirate Birds
programme.desc: Go rogue with frigate birds, who steal meals from smaller seabirds; relax in a mongoose-run spa with a grateful warthog; and decode an African elephant’s secret message. Then watch lovelorn capuchin monkeys hurl rocks to attract prospective mates.

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E1 - A Penguin Proposal
programme.desc: Watch an Antarctic gentoo penguin pop the question with a rocky token of his devotion, then learn how a Madagascar lemur uses toxic millipedes for pest control. Bone up on makeup techniques with a flamingo and meet a honey badger that can pick locks.

programme.title: E4 - Pirate Birds
programme.desc: Go rogue with frigate birds, who steal meals from smaller seabirds; relax in a mongoose-run spa with a grateful warthog; and decode an African elephant’s secret message. Then watch lovelorn capuchin monkeys hurl rocks to attract prospective mates.

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E1 - Earth
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: E4 - The Leopard Who Changed Her Spots
programme.desc: Meet pampered young leopardess Chipadzua, who has never had to hunt for food, thanks to her patient mother. Alone for the first time in her life, will she develop the skills it takes to survive?

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.title: E1 - Earth
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: E4 - The Leopard Who Changed Her Spots
programme.desc: Meet pampered young leopardess Chipadzua, who has never had to hunt for food, thanks to her patient mother. Alone for the first time in her life, will she develop the skills it takes to survive?

programme.title: E4 - Pirate Birds
programme.desc: Go rogue with frigate birds, who steal meals from smaller seabirds; relax in a mongoose-run spa with a grateful warthog; and decode an African elephant’s secret message. Then watch lovelorn capuchin monkeys hurl rocks to attract prospective mates.

programme.title: E4 - Pirate Birds
programme.desc: Go rogue with frigate birds, who steal meals from smaller seabirds; relax in a mongoose-run spa with a grateful warthog; and decode an African elephant’s secret message. Then watch lovelorn capuchin monkeys hurl rocks to attract prospective mates.

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

E7 - Tag's First Day
programme.desc: The Squirrels are crafting in the Clubhouse when Betty saves Tag from throwing water across the table instead of glitter.

programme.title: E8 - The Hat Badge
programme.desc: King Tiger interrupts the Squirrels' quiet time when he turns up to the Clubhouse with a magic hat on instead of his crown.

programme.title: E10 - Go Jet Academy: Hailstorm
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters brand new click-on save the GoJet Academy from a glitched thunderstorm?

programme.title: E4 - River Chub
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to North America in search of a river chub that builds an underwater nest with over 7000 pebbles.

programme.title: E7 - Trolley Dash
programme.desc: Evil Pea causes chaos in the veggie aisle with a trolley loaded to the brim with stinky cheese. Supertato and Broccoli must use the Tato Car to get rid of the stink.

programme.title: E6 - The Why Badge
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: E1 - Cool, Man
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: E20 - Driving
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: E15 - It's Time For A Race
programme.desc: JoJo & Gran Gran have their own sports day with Jared and Cynthia, but when JoJo isn't fast enough to win the races, Gran Gran suggests JoJo try the egg and spoon race instead!

programme.title: E81 - Give It Back
programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Dipsy both want a go with Tinky Winky's bag and start to squabble. The Noo---noo sucks up the bag and only gives it back when Tinky Winky and Dipsy are ready to share.

programme.title: E21 - Panic At The Pumpkin Patch
programme.desc: It's pumpkin-picking day at Jackson's farm, but something spooky has been scaring all the pumpkin pickers. Mojo and Bo need to find out what's going on, and chase some ghosts!

programme.title: E6 - The Why Badge
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E17 - Svalbard Global Seed Vault, Norway
programme.desc: Ubercorn and Glitch head to the Svalbard Global Seed Vault. But, just like when they were cadets together, the two of them get into trouble.

programme.title: E6 - Peas
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: E13 - The Dancing Bug Badge
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: E11 - The Pottery Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.title: E23 - Go Jet Academy: Hurricane Rescue
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch tries to rescue a Grimbot from an Atlantic hurricane. The Go Jetters have to rescue him!

programme.title: E8 - Bags Of Bags
programme.desc: Scarf Lady has misplaced Bag in the Big Shop, so Sarah and Duck help with the search.

programme.title: E9 - I Don't Like Bananas
programme.desc: From broccoli soup to cheeseburgers and blue cheese, the funny animals chat about the best and worst things to eat.

programme.title: E36 - Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: E5 - I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: E2 - Fatberg, London Sewers, England
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots create some enormous blockages after flushing wet wipes.

programme.title: E3 - Cabbage
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage.

programme.desc: The Supermarket is frozen over and Supertato, Carrot, Broccoli and Tomato practice for the boat race by using chopsticks for oars, but it doesn't go well as they're out of sync with each other.

programme.desc: The Supermarket is frozen over and Supertato, Carrot, Broccoli and Tomato practice for the boat race by using chopsticks for oars, but it doesn't go well as they're out of sync with each other.

programme.title: E81 - Give It Back
programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Dipsy both want a go with Tinky Winky's bag and start to squabble. The Noo---noo sucks up the bag and only gives it back when Tinky Winky and Dipsy are ready to share.

programme.title: E21 - Panic At The Pumpkin Patch
programme.desc: It's pumpkin-picking day at Jackson's farm, but something spooky has been scaring all the pumpkin pickers. Mojo and Bo need to find out what's going on, and chase some ghosts!

programme.title: E6 - The Why Badge
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E17 - Svalbard Global Seed Vault, Norway
programme.desc: Ubercorn and Glitch head to the Svalbard Global Seed Vault. But, just like when they were cadets together, the two of them get into trouble.

programme.title: E6 - Peas
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: E13 - The Dancing Bug Badge
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: E11 - The Pottery Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.title: E23 - Go Jet Academy: Hurricane Rescue
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch tries to rescue a Grimbot from an Atlantic hurricane. The Go Jetters have to rescue him!

programme.title: E8 - Bags Of Bags
programme.desc: Scarf Lady has misplaced Bag in the Big Shop, so Sarah and Duck help with the search.

programme.title: E9 - I Don't Like Bananas
programme.desc: From broccoli soup to cheeseburgers and blue cheese, the funny animals chat about the best and worst things to eat.

programme.title: E36 - Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: E5 - I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: E2 - Fatberg, London Sewers, England
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots create some enormous blockages after flushing wet wipes.

programme.title: Savdhaan India -Criminal Decoded
programme.desc: Arun finds Shalini in a bus and makes an insane decision to marry her. Kishore anxiously searches for Shalini when Arun kidnaps her to fulfill his vile motive.

programme.desc: The host provides an in-depth analysis of some of the most shocking real-life crime stories in India and sheds light on how the victims fought back for justice.

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

programme.title: Look For A Star
programme.desc: It's hardly a coincidence that Sam is considered the most eligible bachelor in town. Not only is he a young, smart, and insightful entrepreneur with a coveted fortune, but he also happens to be a blithe spirit with a carefree attitude to life. However, every success has its price. Sam has already divorced three times and finds himself crawling back to the game of love sooner than he has expected. It is love at first sight when Sam chances upon a feisty, fast-talking woman with the odd name of Milan at a Macau casino. But the catch is, she is a part-time poker dealer and a full-time cabaret dancer, “careers” not exactly congruent with his station in life. Fallen in love against all odds, this mismatched couple soon makes headline in all media which turn Milan into an It girl overnight...

programme.title: Best Supporting Actors: Running Out Of Time
programme.desc: Andy has only 14 days left in his life. He burglars a Diamond Trading Company and hence arouses the attention of a Police Negotiator, Sean...

programme.title: My Small Land
programme.desc: For Sarya (17), a Kurdish refugee girl in Japan, life seems to be looking up; her grades at school are enough to pursue college, she's surrounded with good friends and her relationship with Sota is becoming special. Sarya's life becomes upside down, however, when she learns that her family's refugee status is turned down, restricting her family from work and traveling across the city. Her father, who had continued to work to sustain a living, is taken into custody for illegal employment. Sarya is now suddenly forced into a situation where she is responsible not only for her younger siblings but for her very existence.

E13
programme.desc: 非物質文化遺產即某地區文化傳承有重要意義的行為或表現，如民俗、文化、信仰、傳統等各種智慧財產；為了全面展示保護的成果，推動高品質發展，節目打造以非物質文化遺產傳承為主題，令更多人認識及發揚光大。

programme.title: E12 - 愛情需要精密計算嗎？
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E51
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E9 - 尤長靖學妹超穩高音驚艷全場
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E12 - 愛情需要精密計算嗎？
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E51
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E9 - 尤長靖學妹超穩高音驚艷全場
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

E5 - Luxe De Poche/Selva Negra/Nathalie Seiller Dejean
programme.desc: An exhibition called ''Luxe de poche'' (''Pocket Luxury'') reveals the refined accessories of the 18th century, reflecting the habits and customs of the time. The famous traditional Black Forest cake drew its name from a German region. Nathalie Seiller Dejean transforms straw into a treasure trove of refinement. How to wear bootcut trousers.

programme.title: E4 - Holding One's Breath With Champion Marine Simonis
programme.desc: At the heart of the Transatlantic Crayer Street Evening event, an evening on Crayer Street, in Ixelles, which turns into an open-air museum. Also: a meeting with freediver Marine Simonis; the celebration of the Wallonia-Brussels Federation in Paris; a 100% Belgian and 100% organic vineyard.

programme.title: E5 - Luxe De Poche/Selva Negra/Nathalie Seiller Dejean
programme.desc: An exhibition called ''Luxe de poche'' (''Pocket Luxury'') reveals the refined accessories of the 18th century, reflecting the habits and customs of the time. The famous traditional Black Forest cake drew its name from a German region. Nathalie Seiller Dejean transforms straw into a treasure trove of refinement. How to wear bootcut trousers.

programme.title: E4 - Holding One's Breath With Champion Marine Simonis
programme.desc: At the heart of the Transatlantic Crayer Street Evening event, an evening on Crayer Street, in Ixelles, which turns into an open-air museum. programme.title: E4 - Terry's Reindeer Game
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a scene from Reindeer Games when Ben Affleck and Charlize Theron get trapped under a frozen lake, and they escape by shooting 3 shots with a 12-gauge shot gun underwater to blast a hole in the ice to escape.

programme.title: Tubelight
programme.desc: Tubelight is an entertaining family drama set in a small town in the hills of northern India, and tells the story of one man's love for his family and his unshakeable belief in himself. Release Year: 2017 Director: Kabir Khan Awards: Zee Cine Awards- 2018 Nominee Technical Award - Best Cinematography
